2606.23108.title: TTFT-Aware Graph Chain-of-Thought:Distance-Indexed Neural A* for Low-Hallucination Multi-Hop Medical Reasoning
2606.23108.paper_summary: Hallucinations and opaque reasoning remain unacceptable failure modes for clinical LLMs. We present a production-grade GraphRAG stack that constrains answers to verifiable graph chain-of-thought paths in a heterogeneous, ~700K-node medical knowledge graph powering a fertility assistant. The core idea is targeted navigation: a directed Pruned Landmark Labeling (PLL) oracle provides exact distances for sub-millisecond feasibility checks and simple-path enumeration, while a lightweight AStarNet heuristic operates strictly within the PLL corridor to prioritize clinically plausible expansions. We score and pack a small, diverse set of paths (CUI/semantic-type overlap, length prior, provenance priors) to condition generation, yielding compact prompts and improved Time to First Token (TTFT). On fertility-focused queries, the hybrid (PLL+AStarNet) establishes a better latency/recall Pareto frontier than text-only RAG and single-component baselines, lowers TTFT, and reduces clinician-audited hallucinations while preserving explanation clarity. The result is a practical recipe for explainable, low-hallucination multi-hop medical reasoning ready for real-world deployment.
2606.23108.paper_summary_zh: 幻覺和不透明的推理仍然是臨床 LLMs 不可接受的失敗模式。<lb/>我們提出了一個生產級的 GraphRAG 堆疊，該堆疊將答案限制在可驗證的圖形思維鏈路徑中，這些鏈路徑來自一個異構的、約 700K 節點的醫療知識圖，該圖為生育助手提供支持。<lb/>核心理念是有針對性的導航：一個有向的修剪地標標記（PLL）神諭提供了子毫秒可行性檢查和簡單路徑列舉的精確距離，而一個輕量級的 AStarNet 启发式算法則嚴格在 PLL 通道內運作，以優先考慮臨床上合理的擴展。<lb/>我們評分並打包一小組多樣的路徑（CUI/語義類型重疊、長度先驗、來源先驗）以調節生成，從而產生緊湊的提示並改善首次令牌時間（TTFT）。<lb/>在以生育為重點的查詢中，混合（PLL+AStarNet）建立了比僅文本 RAG 和單組件基準更好的延遲/召回 Pareto 邊界，降低了 TTFT，並減少了臨床醫生審核的幻覺，同時保持了解釋的清晰度。<lb/>結果是一個實用的配方，適用於可解釋的、低幻覺的多跳醫療推理，準備好進行實際部署。
2606.23108.author: Bechir Dardouri et.al.
2606.23108.authors: Bechir Dardouri, Kaïs Zhioua, Yassine Msaddak
